title: Treeplacer Wyther's Addon
description: Treeplacer datapack to grow trees from William Wyther's
body:
This is an addon for
[Treeplacer](https://modrinth.com/mod/treeplacer)
and
[William Wyther's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld)
 
Overrides for:
acacia, azalea, birch, dark oak, brown mushroom, jungle, mangrove, oak, red mushrooms, spruce

* Every biome now has a mega version of each. Dark oak has a singular version for all biomes. 
* Flowering azalea is untouched to allow for normal azalea trees.
* Overrides chosen required some interpretation at times as leaves and wood did not always match, when this was the case leave type determined the sapling. There are a few exceptions to this, most single jungle overrides actually have azalea leaves and a few random ones here and there. These occur when two trees use the same leaf type in a biome but are still distinctly different tree shapes. 
* Almost all trees are represented, there are one or two outliers. Experiment or check source files.

If you have feedback of any kind, message me, make a comment, github issue, just contact me in any form you can find.
